title: Change in the Composition of Partners/Board of Directors. The LMA
content: 24 shall notify the Department of every change in the composition of the partnership or board 25 of directors within thirty (30) calendar days from the date of such change, and submit the 26 following prescribed supporting documents: 27 28 a. ln case of change of partners, the amended articles of partnership, and bio-data, 29 pictures, NBI clearances, MWPB multi-purpose clearances and income tax returns 30 for the last two (2) years of the new partners, with proof of payment; and 31 32 b. ln case of election of new members of the Board of Directors, the amended 33 General Information Sheet, certified true copy of the stock and transfer book, and 34 the bio-data, pictures, NBI clearances, MWPB multi-purpose clearances and 35 income tax returns for the last two (2) years of the new directors, with proof of 36 payment of the stock purchased. 37 38 In case of change in the controlling shares or composition of the board of directors/ 39 partnership, or any transfer of control in the operations of an LMA, the new set of board 40 of directors or partner/s, or the new majority shareholder/s, as the case may be, shall be 41 subject to a confirmatory interview to ascertain their qualifications as provided in these 42 Rules. 43 44 In the absence of a court order or temporary restraining order, the Department shall not 45 be precluded from acknowledging and duly recognizing the new management found 46 qualified as provided in these rules. 47 48
